metadata.description: GeckoVision plugins for making APIs agent-usable.

plugins.name: gecko-surf
plugins.description: Make any API agent-usable — comprehend OpenAPI into first-call-correct MCP tools, x402 setup, anti-poisoning. Bundles use-any-api, read-js-docs, anti-poisoning, api-agent-ready, x402-payai-setup, plus agents, commands, and a live TxLINE demo MCP.
